concerns.text: SC-003 states peak memory is measured against a 7 GB limit but lacks a verifiable procedure. The spec must define the specific mechanism (e.g., 'system logs peak RSS via /proc/self/status or a resource-monitoring wrapper') and the pass/fail assertion logic to confirm the limit was not exceeded during execution.

SC-004 states total wall-clock time is measured against a 6-hour limit but does not specify the measurement scope (e.g., 'total CI job duration' vs 'sum of script runtimes') or the logging mechanism required to verify this metric reproducibly.
